params.prompt: Mobile game UI panel designed as a page from a magical journal: a blend of a medieval illuminated storybook and a girl's color-coded notebook. Aged colored paper in warm cream, soft sage green, dusty rose and pale lavender — never pure white — with subtle paper grain. Hand-drawn dark-ink rounded border with tiny botanical vine and leaf doodles in the corners, a thin ribbon bookmark, small washi-tape tabs along the top edge in coordinated muted colors, faint hand-ruled lines. Flat lay top-down, centered, clean simple transparent-feeling background around the page, soft drop shadow. No text, no lettering, no words. Cozy hand-crafted cohesive aesthetic, 1930s storybook warmth, thick clean outlines, flat muted zen palette.
